heroText: This is the working hub for pioneers. Review the weekly material, revisit prior presentations, access the attendee contact list, and watch for leadership notes and updates.

thisWeek.title: Weekly Questions
thisWeek.text: This weeks questions are quite simple:  Tell the group one secret no one else knows about you

thisWeek.title: Leader Emphasis
thisWeek.text: 1.  Remember that you go first, then next would be any other graduate.  2.  Once a man tells his secret ask the other men if they respect him more or less.  Emphasize how the enemy tells us people will respect you less if they knew and how that is a lie proven right here

thisWeek.title: What To Be Ready For
thisWeek.text: If you are so led, after the secret you can say something like - Im sorry that happened to you - or - I know what that feels like.  If its appropriate ask the other men if they have struggled with somehting like that.

posts.title: Set the tone early.
posts.text: Remember to follow up with new guys after this weeks meeting.  This is when a man is most likely to never return

posts.title: Watch for the quiet men.
posts.text: Some of the men who say the least up front are often being hit the hardest. Do not confuse quiet with disengaged. Pay attention, stay warm, and keep them in the game.

reviewMaterials.title: Leader Review Sheet
reviewMaterials.text: Optional one-page guide for pioneers to revisit before the next session.

contactList.title: Open Contact Spreadsheet
contactList.text: Link your Google Sheet, Excel file, or shared contact doc here.
contactList.note: Keep this limited to the information pioneers truly need.

downloads.title: Extra Resource
downloads.text: Anything else you want pioneers to review.
